acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding generation prompt templates
Generation prompts define a system prompt and user prompt template that instruct the LLM to produce valid impl doc pairs
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that generation.ts exports a system prompt (string constant or function) and a user prompt template function. The system prompt must instruct the LLM to decompose a spec into impl docs producing paired JSON definition and Markdown description artifacts. The user prompt template must accept parameters for impl_json, impl_markdown, spec_sections_content, codebase_context, build_command, test_command, and lint_command. Both must reference the ImplDefinition schema and the 7-H2-section Markdown template. Verdict: PASS if both prompts are present, correctly parameterized, and reference the schema/template; FAIL otherwise.
